title: roylea cinerea
intro: Roylea cinerea, also known as Himalayan fir or blue pine, is a species of coniferous tree native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Roylea cinerea include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. Roylea cinerea can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to promote overall well-being and alleviate specific health conditions.
